name: Loyaltymaster Component Registry
description: Machine-readable registry for the 33 approved LoyaltyMaster components: 20 Wave 1 library components plus 13 promoted MagicPath handoff components.

rules.sourceOfTruth: Use registry/spec/library/showcase as canonical. /Components is approved evidence and handoff archive only.
rules.defaultStack: Next.js 16 App Router, React 18, TypeScript 5.5, Tailwind 3

components.name: Article Body
components.description: Long-form marketing, explainer, company story, and editorial body content with approved LoyaltyMaster prose rhythm.
components.whenToUse: Use for narrative article, explainer, company story, and editorial pages that need readable body prose rather than cards or feature grids.
components.whenNotToUse: Do not use for legal policies, searchable indexes, contact forms, or compact feature sections.
components.markdownCallSyntax:
:::loyaltymaster-component id="article-body"
props:
  # use only registry-approved props from registry/components.json
:::

variants.description: Approved default layout for the source-page pattern.

slots.description: Approved title slot for Article Body.

slots.name: intro
slots.description: Approved intro slot for Article Body.

slots.name: sections
slots.description: Approved sections slot for Article Body.

slots.name: image
slots.description: Approved image slot for Article Body.

slots.name: action
slots.description: Approved action slot for Article Body.

components.name: Billing Toggle Button
components.description: Monthly/yearly billing toggle control for pricing sections.
components.whenToUse: Use when a pricing view needs a clear two-state billing cadence selector.
components.whenNotToUse: Do not use as a generic tab control or unrelated segmented control.

onChange.description: Callback receiving the selected billing cadence.

variants.description: Approved default variant. Do not invent unregistered variants.

slots.name: onChange
